message:
fix: Add runtime exports and fix pyHash codegen for tuples (Phase 7)

Fixes:
- Add script_helper stubs (assert_python_failure, assert_python_ok)
- Add dict and defaultdict type constructors to builtins
- Export pyDictKeys, pyDictValues, pyDictItems from runtime.zig
- Add printWithOptions export and sys.__stdout__/__stderr__ constants
- Fix pyHash codegen to use runtime.pyHash() for all types (not .pyHash() method)
- Fix parameter shadowing in builtins.zig (dict -> d, keys -> result_keys)

7 core tests still pass: bool, float, unary, int_literal, longexp, binop, complex
